list.name: service
list.label: Service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM otel_traces WHERE SpanName LIKE 'qdrant.%' ORDER BY ServiceName

list.name: operation
list.label: Operation
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT SpanName FROM otel_traces WHERE SpanName LIKE 'qdrant.%' ORDER BY SpanName

list.name: collection
list.label: Collection
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['db.collection'] AS c FROM otel_traces WHERE SpanName LIKE 'qdrant.%' AND c != '' ORDER BY c

panels.title: p99 latency by operation (ms)
panels.description: Per-call Duration of qdrant.<method> spans, as experienced by the app (includes retry-proxy retries + backoff).

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, SpanName AS operation, quantile(0.99)(Duration) / 1e6 AS p99 FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanName LIKE 'qdrant.%' AND SpanName IN (${operation:singlequote}) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanAttributes['db.collection'] IN (${collection:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, operation ORDER BY time

panels.title: Failed ops (range)
panels.description: qdrant.<method> spans with StatusCode = Error: non-retryable errors or calls that exhausted all retries.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS failed FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanName LIKE 'qdrant.%' AND StatusCode = 'Error' AND SpanName IN (${operation:singlequote}) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanAttributes['db.collection'] IN (${collection:singlequote})

SELECT countIf(toUInt32OrZero(SpanAttributes['db.retry.attempts']) > 1) AS retried FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanName LIKE 'qdrant.%' AND SpanName IN (${operation:singlequote}) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanAttributes['db.collection'] IN (${collection:singlequote})

SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, SpanName AS operation, count() / 30 AS ops_per_sec FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanName LIKE 'qdrant.%' AND SpanName IN (${operation:singlequote}) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanAttributes['db.collection'] IN (${collection:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, operation ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, SpanName AS operation, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') / 30 AS errors_per_sec FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanName LIKE 'qdrant.%' AND SpanName IN (${operation:singlequote}) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanAttributes['db.collection'] IN (${collection:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, operation ORDER BY time

SELECT SpanName AS operation, count() AS calls, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') AS errors, round(quantile(0.50)(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS p50_ms, round(quantile(0.90)(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS p90_ms, round(quantile(0.99)(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS p99_ms, round(max(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS max_ms FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanName LIKE 'qdrant.%' AND SpanName IN (${operation:singlequote}) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanAttributes['db.collection'] IN (${collection:singlequote}) GROUP BY operation ORDER BY p99_ms DESC

SELECT Timestamp, ServiceName, SpanName AS operation, SpanAttributes['db.collection'] AS collection, toUInt32OrZero(SpanAttributes['db.retry.attempts']) AS attempts, round(Duration / 1e6, 3) AS duration_ms, StatusCode, TraceId FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanName LIKE 'qdrant.%' AND SpanName IN (${operation:singlequote}) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanAttributes['db.collection'] IN (${collection:singlequote}) ORDER BY Duration DESC LIMIT 100
